prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合物理类位次持续后移趋势、2026年本省考生明显增加（+8.4%）、招生计划小幅扩招（+6.5%）及学校顶尖层次带来的稳定吸引力，预计2026年最低位 次在2025年5154名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约5434名，区间4934–5934名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1866 → 2157 → 3940 → 4436 → 5154, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3288 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 5154 places, with the backward shift increasing year by year; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 30 in 2021–2022, 32 in 2023, 34 in 2024, and 31 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 33, a slight expansion of about 6.5% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition, but the expansion is smaller than the increase in candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 19th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the top 20 in recent years, belonging to the top normal comprehensive university in China; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 37th (relatively hot), short video exposure is moderately high, application attention is stable; in 2022, there was an abnormal admission score line in Jiangxi, but it has recovered and stabilized in recent years; Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Geography A+, Marxist Theory A+, Mathematics A, Statistics A, and 18 other A- and above disciplines, with strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other science and engineering majors are highly recommended by social heat; the number of Physics Category candidates in this province in 2026 is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; compared to the 2024 score line of 422 points, the overall exam difficulty may have been adjusted; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Hunan candidates; the school's enrollment proportion in Hunan is about 2.5%–3.5%, which is moderate.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of Physics Category rankings, the significant increase in provincial candidates in 2026 (+8.4%), the slight expansion of enrollment plans (+6.5%), and the stable attraction of the school's top tier, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 5154; the predicted minimum ranking is about 5434, with a range of 4934–5934.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 588 → 897 → 339 → 357 → 455. There was a notable backward shift in 2021–2022, a sharp recovery to 339th in 2023, and stability in the 350–460 range in recent two years. The 2025 baseline is about 455th. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 24 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 27 in 2024, and 19 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 18, a slight reduction of about 5.3% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 19th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the top 20 in recent years, making it a top-tier national normal comprehensive university. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. In 2022, there was an anomaly in the admission score line in Jiangxi, but it has recovered and stabilized in recent years. Education A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Psychology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Philosophy A-, Law A-, etc., with top national strength in liberal arts disciplines.

专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Literature recommended, Law differentiation to watch, Teacher Training/Education differentiation to watch. Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Hunan liberal arts examinees. 预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation of History Category rankings in the 350–460 range in recent years, the significant increase in provincial examinees in 2026 (+31.2%), the slight reduction in enrollment plan (-5.3%), and the sustained appeal of the university's top liberal arts strength, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 455th. The predicted minimum ranking is about 456th, with a range of 401–511th.
